mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamMapper.quizBscSelect 설 명 : 퀴즈기본조회 */ WITH EXAM AS ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT MAX(EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N') AS EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM , EVL_SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST EVL_SBST ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EVL_SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID AND BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND BSC.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE BSC.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID', 'EXAM_LST') ), SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ) SELECT EXAM_BSC.* , (SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCTNM , (SELECT DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID) AS DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM EXAM WHERE EXAM.EXAM_SBST_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM FROM EXAM WHERE EXAM.EXAM_SBST_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM , CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%SBST%' THEN (SELECT COUNT(TKEXAM.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(TKEXAM.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER)) END AS TKEXAM_STRT_USER_CNT , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1)))) LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : ExamMapper.examTrgtrDelete 설 명 : 시험대상자삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID IN (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId})
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.mrkRfltQuizList 설 명 : 성적반영퀴즈목록 */ SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizGrpSbjctList 설 명 : 퀴즈그룹과목목록조회 */ WITH DVCLAS_SBJCT AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , EXAM_BSC_ID , LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN , (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC WHERE ( EXAM_GRP_ID = (SELECT EXAM_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'Y') OR EXAM_BSC_ID = (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'N') ) AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID)))) AS LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT) ORDER BY DVCLAS_NO
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.examBscIdSelect 설 명 : 시험기본아이디조회 */ SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_GRP_ID = #{examGrpId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizTeamList 설 명 : 퀴즈팀목록조회 */ SELECT EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID , (SELECT TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND TEAM_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID) AS TEAMNM , EXAM_DTL.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR EXAM_TRGTR ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizTeamQstnsCmptnynSelect 설 명 : 퀴즈팀문제출제완료여부조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.tkexamStrtUserCntSelect 설 명 : 시험응시시작사용자수조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ), TKEXAM_USER AS ( SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM WHERE TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL ) SELECT CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%SBST%' THEN (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM TKEXAM_USER WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM TKEXAM_USER WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER)) END AS TKEXAM_STRT_USER_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.sbjctDvclasList 설 명 : 과목분반목록조회 */ WITH SBJCT AS ( SELECT PROF_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR_CHRT ON SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR_CHRT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJCT.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SBJCT_ADM ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID = (SELECT PROF_ID FROM SBJCT) WHERE SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = (SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM SBJCT) ORDER BY SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_CTGRCD , A.ORG_ID , A.EXAM_TTL , A.EXAM_CTS , A.EXAM_TYCD , CASE A.EXAM_TYCD WHEN 'QUIZ' THEN '퀴즈' WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN '과제' WHEN 'FORUM' THEN '토론' WHEN 'EXAM' THEN '실시간 시험' ELSE '기타' END AS EXAM_TYPE_NM , A.TKEXAM_TYCD , CASE A.TKEXAM_TYCD WHEN 'M' THEN '중간고사' WHEN 'L' THEN '기말고사' WHEN 'A' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' THEN '수시평가' ELSE '상시' END END AS EXAM_STARE_TYPE_NM , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT ASMT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N') END AS EXAM_SBST_REF_ID , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT EXAM_TTL FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT ASMT_TTL FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT DSCS_TTL FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) END AS INS_REF_NM , NVL((SELECT EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID), 'N') AS EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT EXT_SEND_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT EXTD_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) END AS EXT_SEND_DTTM , A.EXAM_ALLOC_TYCD , A.EXAM_EXPSR_TYCD , A.QSTN_DSPLY_TYCD , A.QSTNS_TYCD , NVL(A.TKEXAM_MNTS, (SELECT TKEXAM_MNTS FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID)) AS TKEXAM_MNTS , A.QSTN_RNDMYN , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.USEYN , NVL(A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, 'N') AS EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN , A.TMLMTYN , A.EXAMPPR_OYN , A.DVCLAS_REGYN , A.PUSH_NOTIYN , A.AVG_MRK_OYN , A.TKEXAM_MNTS_USEYN , A.MAX_TKEXAM_CNT , A.STARE_CRIT_PRGR_RATIO , CASE WHEN A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' THEN NVL((SELECT MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'MIDDLE_TEST' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}), 0) WHEN A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' THEN NVL((SELECT MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE MRK_TYCD = 'LAST_TEST' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}), 0) ELSE NVL(A.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) END AS MRK_RFLTRT , A.EXAM_SDTTM , A.EXAM_EDTTM , A.REEXAMYN , A.RE_EXAM_START_DTTM , A.RE_EXAM_END_DTTM , A.REEXAM_RFLTRT , A.RE_EXAM_STARE_TM , A.DSBL_ADD_TM , A.PASS_SCORE , A.DSBLYN , A.CNSDR_ADD_MNTS , A.MRK_OYN , A.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM , A.SEC_CERT_CD , A.IMDT_ANSW_SHT_INQYN , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , (SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS LCTR_SCHDLNM , A.DELYN , A.REG_YN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , COUNT(A.EXAM_ID) OVER()
, #{stdNo} AS STD_ID , (SELECT E.STARE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) AS STARE_CNT , NVL((SELECT HSTRY_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS HSTRY_TYCD , CASE WHEN(SELECT CASE WHEN TO_DATE(E.SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + NUMTODSINTERVAL(A.TKEXAM_MNTS, 'MINUTE') < SYSDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS STARE_YN , (SELECT E.SDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) AS SDTTM , (SELECT E.EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) AS EDTTM , (SELECT E.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) AS ACQS_TOT_SCR , CASE WHEN A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' THEN ( SELECT (CASE WHEN E.STARE_CNT > 0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'N'END) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) ELSE (SELECT (CASE WHEN E.SDTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN E.EDTTM IS NULL THEN 'T' WHEN E.EDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN 'C' END) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) END AS STARE_STATUS_CD , CASE WHEN (SELECT REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXAM_ABSENT_APPROVE_YN , CASE WHEN (SELECT APRV_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND ROWNUM = 1) IN ('APPLICATE', 'RAPPLICATE', 'APPROVE') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS EXAM_ABSENT_YN , (SELECT EXAM_ABSNCE_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND ROWNUM = 1) AS EXAM_ABSNCE_ID , (SELECT E.REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) AS STU_RE_EXAM_YN , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.RE_EXAM_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.RE_EXAM_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.RE_EXAM_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.RE_EXAM_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS RE_EXAM_STATUS , NVL((SELECT E.EVLYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE E WHERE E.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND E.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND E.DELYN = 'N'), 'N') AS STU_EVAL_YN , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.STARE_CNT > 0 AND BB.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), 'N') WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('LATE', 'SUBMIT') and AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), 'N') WHEN 'FORUM' THEN NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND BB.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND (0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' ) OR 0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' )) and AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), 'N') END AS INS_JOIN_YN , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT AA.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT AA.SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT AA.SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}) END AS INS_SCORE , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT AA.MRK_OYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT AA.MRK_OYN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT AA.MRK_OYN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) END AS INS_SCORE_OPEN_YN
, (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID) AS SBJCT_ID
, CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND EVLYN = 'Y' AND STARE_CNT >0 AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N')))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.STARE_CNT > 0 AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y' AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N') END AS EXAM_EVAL_CNT , CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND STARE_CNT > 0 AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N')))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.STARE_CNT > 0 AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N') END AS EXAM_JOIN_USER_CNT , CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N')))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N') END AS EXAM_START_USER_CNT , CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N'))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT BB ON AA.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID AND BB.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N') END AS EXAM_TOTAL_USER_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND CNDDT_ID = 1) AS EXAM_QSTN_CNT , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS EXAM_STATUS , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 1, 8) THEN '대기' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 1, 8) THEN '진행' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') > SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 1, 8) THEN '완료' END AS ERP_EXAM_STATUS
, (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT AA.USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND AA.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND AA.RPRSYN = 'Y')) AS TCH_NM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT AA.USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND AA.PROF_TYCD = 'ASSISTANT' AND ROWNUM = 1)) AS TUTOR_NM
, CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT EXAM_SDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT SEND_START_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT DSCS_SDTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) END AS INS_START_DTTM , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT EXAM_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN (SELECT SEND_END_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) WHEN 'FORUM' THEN (SELECT DSCS_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID) END AS INS_END_DTTM , NVL((SELECT PRD_AFTR_WRTYN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID), 'N') AS PRD_AFTR_WRTYN , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.STARE_CNT > 0 AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.STARE_CNT > 0) END WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('LATE', 'SUBMIT') AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('LATE', 'SUBMIT')) END WHEN 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE BB.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' ) OR 0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' )) AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE BB.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' ) OR 0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AAA WHERE AAA.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AAA.STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND AAA.DELYN = 'N' ))) END END AS INS_JOIN_USER_CNT , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN AA INNER JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON BB.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE AA.ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.EVLYN = 'Y') END WHEN 'FORUM' THEN CASE WHEN A.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE BB.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND BB.EVLYN = 'Y' AND AA.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID)) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT CC ON AA.USER_ID = CC.USER_ID AND CC.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE BB.DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND BB.EVLYN = 'Y') END END AS INS_EVAL_USER_CNT , CASE WHEN A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE AA JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT BB ON AA.STD_ID = BB.STD_ID AND BB.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND BB.AUDITYN = 'N' WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND BB.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND AA.REEXAMYN = 'Y') ELSE 0 END AS EXAM_SUBS_CNT , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN '퀴즈' WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN '과제' WHEN 'FORUM' THEN '토론' END AS INS_REF_TYPE_NM , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN NVL((SELECT EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), 'N') ELSE 'Y' END AS INS_SUBMIT_YN , CASE SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, 1, INSTR(A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID, '_') - 1) WHEN 'EXAM' THEN NVL((SELECT DELYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID), 'Y') WHEN 'ASMNT' THEN NVL((SELECT DELYN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID), 'Y') WHEN 'FORUM' THEN NVL((SELECT DELYN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = A.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID), 'Y') END AS INS_DEL_YN , (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_CD , (SELECT EXAM_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.EXAM_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_END_DTTM , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = SUBSTR(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 1, 8) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TODAY_YN
FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A INNER JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N'
AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
AND LOWER(A.EXAM_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue}))
AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = #{examCtgrCd}
AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD IN ('QUIZ', 'SUBS', 'EXAMQUIZ')
AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN IN ('Y', 'M')
AND A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = #{examSubmitYn}
AND A.EXAM_ID NOT IN ( SELECT X.EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC X WHERE X.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND X.EXAM_TYCD = 'SUBS' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE BB ON AA.EXAM_ID = BB.EXAM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' AND BB.REEXAMYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT CC ON BB.STD_ID = CC.STD_ID AND CC.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND CC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND CC.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = X.EXAM_ID ) )
AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = #{examStareTypeCd} AND ROWNUM = 1 ORDER BY A.EXAM_SDTTM DESC
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.select 설 명 : 시험 정보 */

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.list 설 명 : 시험 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.EXAM_SDTTM DESC, A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO , A.* FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ExamMapper.listExamCreCrsDecls 설 명 : 시험과 같이 등록된 분반 또는 다른 과목 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , C.SBJCTNM AS crsCreNm , C.SBJCT_ID AS creYear , C.CRS_ID AS creTerm , A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , B.EXAM_TTL AS examTitle , A.GRPCD AS grpCd FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AA WHERE AA.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND AA.GRPCD = A.GRPCD AND AA.EXAM_ID <> A.EXAM_ID )
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.updateExamCreCrsRltn 설 명 : 시험 강의 연결 삭제 상태로 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectCreCrsExamRltn 설 명 : 시험 강의 연결 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.EXAM_ID AS examCd , A.GRPCD AS grpCd , A.DELYN AS delYn FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN A WHERE 1=1
AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.sumScoreRatio 설 명 : 시험 성적 반영 점수 합산 조회 */ SELECT NVL(SUM(MRK_RFLTRT), 0) AS sumScoreRatio FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_ID IN (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) AND DELYN = 'N' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND TKEXAM_TYCD = #{examStareTypeCd}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectByInsRefCd 설 명 : 대체 과제 코드로 시험 정보 조회 */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT EXAM_ID AS examCd FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = #{insRefCd} ORDER BY MOD_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectExamEncryptoInfo 설 명 : 시험 암호화용 파라미터 정보 조회 */ SELECT CASE A.TKEXAM_TYCD WHEN 'M' THEN '01' WHEN 'L' THEN '02' END AS EXAM_GBNCD , C.SBJCT_ID AS SBJCT_ID , CASE C.CRS_ID WHEN '1' THEN '10' WHEN '2' THEN '20' WHEN '3' THEN '11' WHEN '4' THEN '21' ELSE C.CRS_ID END AS CRS_ID , C.CRS_ID AS CRS_ID , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT AA.USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND AA.RPRSYN = 'Y' AND AA.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR')) AS TCH_ID , LPAD(C.DVCLAS_NO, 2, '0') AS DVCLAS_NO , D.USER_ID AS USER_ID , E.USERNM AS USERNM , E.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , E.DEPTNM AS DEPTNM , LPAD( NVL((SELECT SCYR FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND USER_ID = 'prof1' AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N'), '1') , 4, '0') AS USER_GRADE , E.EMAIL AS EMAIL , E.MOBILE_NO AS MOBILE_NO , A.EXAM_TTL AS EXAM_TTL , A.SBJCT_LCTR_WKNO FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON D.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USR E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND D.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectCreCrsByExam 설 명 : 시험과목 정보 조회 */ SELECT C.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd, C.SBJCTNM AS crsCreNm, (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE DEPT_CD = C.DEPT_CD AND ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND USEYN = 'Y') AS crsDeptNm, C.CRS_ID AS crsCd, C.DVCLAS_NO AS declsNo, (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'EXAM_STARE_UNI_CD' AND CD = A.TKEXAM_TYCD) AS examStareTypeNm, A.EXAM_ID, A.EXAM_SDTTM AS examStartDttm, (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT AA.USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND AA.RPRSYN = 'Y' AND AA.PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR')) AS tchNm, STD.STD_ID AS stdNo FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SBJCT_ID, USER_ID, STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE (SBJCT_ID, USER_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM) IN ( SELECT SBJCT_ID, USER_ID, MAX(FRST_INQ_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE ATNDLC_STSCD <> 'D' GROUP BY SBJCT_ID, USER_ID ) AND ATNDLC_STSCD <> 'D' ) STD ON STD.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND STD.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectStareTypeCount 설 명 : 시험 응시 유형 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(A.EXAM_ID) AS cnt FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AS A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AS B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.EXAM_ID <> #{examCd} AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = #{examStareTypeCd} AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listQuizScoreAply 설 명 : 성적 반영 퀴즈 목록 */ SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.EXAM_CTGRCD = #{examCtgrCd} AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'A' AND A.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectExamInsInfo 설 명 : 시험 기타, 대체 과제 정보 조회 */
SELECT A.* , ( SELECT COUNT(STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.AUDITYN = 'N') AS TOTAL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND C.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' AND B.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APRV_STSCD = 'APPROVE' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXAM_ID = (SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.CODE))) AS SUBS_CNT FROM ( SELECT 'EXAM' AS TYPE_CD , '퀴즈' AS TYPE_NM , A.EXAM_ID AS CODE , A.EXAM_TTL AS TTL , TO_CHAR(A.EXAM_CTS) AS SND_CTS , A.EXAM_SDTTM AS SDTTM , A.EXAM_EDTTM AS EDTTM , CASE WHEN A.QSTNS_TYCD = 'RANDOM' THEN '예' ELSE '아니오' END AS QSTN_SET_TYPE_NM , A.TKEXAM_MNTS , CASE WHEN A.QSTN_RNDMYN = 'Y' THEN '예' ELSE '아니오' END AS EMPL_RANDOM_NM , '' AS EVAL_CTGR_NM , '' AS SEND_TYPE_NM , '' AS PRTC_NM , '' AS EXT_NM , '' AS EXT_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(C.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON C.STD_ID = D.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND E.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND C.EDTTM IS NOT NULL) AS JOIN_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(C.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT D ON C.STD_ID = D.STD_ID AND D.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT E ON D.USER_ID = E.USER_ID AND E.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE D.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND C.EVLYN = 'Y') AS EVAL_CNT , NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C WHERE C.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND C.EDTTM IS NOT NULL), 'N') AS JOIN_YN , A.MRK_OYN , NVL((SELECT C.ACQS_TOT_SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE C WHERE C.EXAM_ID = A.EXAM_ID AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), '0') AS SCR , NVL(A.EXAMPPR_OYN, 'N') AS EXAMPPR_OYN , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS STSCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{insRefCd} AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT 'ASMNT' AS TYPE_CD , '과제' AS TYPE_NM , A.ASMT_ID AS CODE , A.ASMT_TTL AS TTL , TO_CHAR(A.ASMT_CTS) AS SND_CTS , A.SEND_START_DTTM AS SDTTM , A.SEND_END_DTTM AS EDTTM , '' AS QSTN_SET_TYPE_NM , NULL AS TKEXAM_MNTS , '' AS EMPL_RANDOM_NM , CASE WHEN A.EVL_CTGRCD = 'R' THEN '루브릭' ELSE '점수형' END AS EVAL_CTGR_NM , CASE WHEN A.SEND_TYPE = 'F' THEN '파일' ELSE '텍스트' END AS SEND_TYPE_NM , CASE WHEN A.PRTC_YN = 'Y' THEN '예' ELSE '아니오' END AS PRTC_NM , CASE WHEN A.EXT_SEND_ACPT_YN = 'Y' THEN '예' ELSE '아니오' END AS EXT_NM , A.EXT_SEND_DTTM AS EXT_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B WHERE B.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND B.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS JOIN_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B WHERE B.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND B.EVLYN = 'Y' AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS EVAL_CNT , NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B WHERE B.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE')), 'N') AS JOIN_YN , A.MRK_OYN , NVL((SELECT B.SCR FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B WHERE B.ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND B.DELYN = 'N'), '0') AS SCR , '' AS EXAMPPR_OYN , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.SEND_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.SEND_START_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.SEND_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.SEND_END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS STSCD FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{insRefCd} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT 'FORUM' AS TYPE_CD , '토론' AS TYPE_NM , A.DSCS_ID AS CODE , A.DSCS_TTL AS TTL , TO_CHAR(A.DSCS_CTS) AS SND_CTS , A.DSCS_SDTTM AS SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM AS EDTTM , '' AS QSTN_SET_TYPE_NM , NULL AS TKEXAM_MNTS , '' AS EMPL_RANDOM_NM , CASE WHEN A.EVL_CTGRCD = 'P' THEN '점수형' ELSE '참여형' END AS EVAL_CTGR_NM , '' AS SEND_TYPE_NM , '' AS PRTC_NM , CASE WHEN A.PRD_AFTR_WRTYN = 'Y' THEN '예' ELSE '아니오' END AS EXT_NM , A.EXTD_EDTTM AS EXT_DTTM , (SELECT COUNT(AA.STD_ID) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT B.STD_ID, C.DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL C ON B.STD_ID = C.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT D ON B.STD_ID = D.STD_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (C.DELYN = 'N' OR D.DELYN = 'N')) AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{insRefCd}) AS JOIN_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(B.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B WHERE B.EVLYN = 'Y' AND B.SCR > 0 AND B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID) AS EVAL_CNT , NVL((SELECT DISTINCT 'Y' FROM (SELECT DISTINCT B.STD_ID, C.DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL C ON B.STD_ID = C.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT D ON B.STD_ID = D.STD_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (C.DELYN = 'N' OR D.DELYN = 'N')) AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{insRefCd} and AA.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), 'N') AS JOIN_YN , A.MRK_OYN , NVL((SELECT B.SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = #{stdNo}), '0') , '' AS EXAMPPR_OYN , CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.DSCS_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '대기' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.DSCS_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND (TO_DATE(A.DSCS_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN '진행' WHEN (TO_DATE(A.DSCS_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 THEN '완료' END AS STSCD FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{insRefCd} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) A

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listExamInsUser 설 명 : 시험 기타, 대체 과제 미참여자 목록 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.* , B.USERNM , B.DEPTNM , B.MOBILE_NO , B.EMAIL , NVL(B.ENTR_YY, '-') AS ENTR_YY , NVL(B.ENTR_HY, '-') AS ENTR_HY , NVL(B.ENTR_GBN_NM, '-') AS ENTR_GBN_NM FROM ( SELECT 'EXAM' AS TYPE_CD , A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , NVL(A.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.STD_ID NOT IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = #{insRefCd} AND EDTTM IS NOT NULL) UNION ALL SELECT 'ASMNT' AS TYPE_CD , A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , NVL(A.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.STD_ID NOT IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN WHERE ASMT_ID = #{insRefCd} AND SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT', 'RE', 'LATE') AND DELYN = 'N') UNION ALL SELECT 'FORUM' AS TYPE_CD , A.USER_ID , A.STD_ID , NVL(A.SCYR, '-') AS SCYR FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.STD_ID NOT IN (SELECT AA.STD_ID FROM (SELECT DISTINCT B.STD_ID, C.DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL C ON B.STD_ID = C.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT D ON B.STD_ID = D.STD_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (C.DELYN = 'N' OR D.DELYN = 'N')) AA WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = #{insRefCd}) ) A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.TYPE_CD = #{searchType}
AND A.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND APRV_STSCD = 'APPROVE')
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.resetReExam 설 명 : 시험 재시험 설정 취소 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC SET MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , RE_EXAM_START_DTTM = NULL , RE_EXAM_END_DTTM = NULL , RE_EXAM_STARE_TM = 0 , DSBL_ADD_TM = 0 , REEXAMYN = 'N' WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectExamWait 설 명 : 중간/기말 시작 여부 */ SELECT NVL( (SELECT CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'M' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}), 'Y') AS MID_EXAM_WAIT_YN , NVL( (SELECT CASE WHEN (TO_DATE(A.EXAM_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND A.TKEXAM_TYCD = 'L' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}), 'Y') AS LAST_EXAM_WAIT_YN FROM DUAL

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listSetInsRef 설 명 : 중간/기말 대체평가 연결 가능 목록 */ WITH M AS ( /* 과제 */ SELECT 'ASMNT' AS STARE_TYPE , '과제' AS STARE_TYPE_NM , A.ASMT_ID AS CODE , A.ASMT_TTL AS TTL , 'Y' AS SUBMIT_YN , A.SEND_START_DTTM AS SYMD , A.SEND_END_DTTM AS EYMD FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ASMT_CTGRCD IN('NOMAL', 'PRACTICE', 'TEAM') AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} /* 토론 */ UNION ALL SELECT 'FORUM' AS STARE_TYPE , '토론' AS STARE_TYPE_NM , A.DSCS_ID AS CODE , A.DSCS_TTL AS TTL , 'Y' AS SUBMIT_YN , A.DSCS_SDTTM AS SYMD , A.DSCS_EDTTM AS EYMD FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.DSCS_TYCD IN ('NORMAL', 'NOMAL') AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} /* 퀴즈 */ UNION ALL SELECT 'QUIZ' AS STARE_TYPE , '퀴즈' AS STARE_TYPE_NM , A.EXAM_ID AS CODE , A.EXAM_TTL AS TTL , NVL(A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN, 'N') AS SUBMIT_YN , A.EXAM_SDTTM AS SYMD , A.EXAM_EDTTM AS EYMD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AS A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AS B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID WHERE A.EXAM_CTGRCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) SELECT M.STARE_TYPE , M.STARE_TYPE_NM , M.CODE , M.TTL , M.SUBMIT_YN , M.SYMD , M.EYMD FROM M WHERE M.STARE_TYPE = #{examTypeCd}
